scripts.start: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix backend && npm run type-check --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
